text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her running in the autumn Tenno Sho has become
the talk of the town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her media exposure has also been increasing
compared to before.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Next you'll be conquering the Arima Kinen... Are
you eager to take on the challenge?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Of course, training for a tricky track is a must...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to find what I currently lack, be it a
mental quality or a physical one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I see, something you lack...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, to succeed in the Arima Kinen against
rivals like Manhattan Cafe and other
contemporaries, one must—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: ...Agnes Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Rivals, you say? I see... there is some logic to
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There seems to be something significant behind
that word, but she doesn't elaborate on what it
meant to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Gah, this really takes it out of you! My legs are
feeling heavier and heavier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why, if it isn't Cafe! Can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps you're here to volunteer as a test
subject for the new mixture I developed
yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Then, what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe speaks with a certain air of
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...WIll you run with me? I... really want to surpass
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the opening gates echoes under the
blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon and Manhattan Cafe hit the turf
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is one length behind... Both
appear dialed in on each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rounding the fourth turn, they enter the final
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon gains speed. Manhattan Cafe
follows suit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff! Huff! Puff!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Hmm. I can't pull away. What incredible
determination... What should I do?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Wait, "What should I do?" My opponents have
never concerned me like this before.)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I want to catch up to you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, hahaha—AHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who knew that having such burning passion
beside me would be so fascinating?! I never
realized it until now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Until now, my interest has solely been in
exploring the unknown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon's eyes sparkle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How curious! I cannot afford to hand this victory
over to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two dash down the 200-meter final stretch,
each unwilling to give up the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, Agnes Tachyon comes out the victor.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon loses herself in thought as
Manhattan Cafe attempts to catch her breath.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Mmm. That was deeply fascinating. I must
conduct a self-analysis immediately.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Has my perspective been broadened? No...
maybe because of Cafe...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Wait! Why did I say, "because of Cafe," just
now?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ummm... thank you. I didn't win today, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... in the Arima Kinen... I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Hold on a second. Why are you suddenly
so antagonistic towards me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. Perhaps "antagonistic" is the wrong
word... Rather, you're viewing me as a "rival."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe. I don't know if I can believe it either...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Watching you in the autumn Tenno Sho...
reminded me a bit of my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So... I thought if I could beat you now, then
surely... I could catch up to them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon watches intently as Manhattan
Cafe hesitantly speaks.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This "friend" you speak of... is the one invisible to
the eye, correct?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm! Emotional with a blind passion
everything! Your demeanor may be the result of
brain chemistry, but your peculiarity is that of a
genius!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I would deem you worthy of possessing
the mysterious potential that science ought to
uncover!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, if only I could dissect your brain just
once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, her tone shifts, as if she's just realized
something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... that's right. That's why you're "special" to
me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she's long favored Manhattan Cafe over
the others around her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it? You seem to possess all of
what I do not.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I even think to myself how interesting it might be
to mimic your lifestyle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is, you could very well be the last element
needed to push me where I want to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon, whose head is always buried
deep into her research, is actually considering
someone special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'm sure this is it. I now have everything I
was previously lacking. Thank you, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I mean that our competitive bond will continue to
drive us to outdo each other.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I'm looking forward to our race in
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's bewilderment quickly turns into
determination. She looks Agnes Tachyon straight
in the eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During an interview the next day...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Are there any racers you would consider your
rival?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I decided just yesterday, actually! It's
Manhattan Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her... I'm really looking forward to the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her answer makes headlines the day after.
